name: Wix Cache Sync — Bookings & Services → PostgreSQL

meta.description: Syncs Wix Bookings and Services into PostgreSQL via the Cabinet API. Runs every 6 hours automatically. Manual trigger: POST /webhook/wix-cache-sync/trigger. Uses env vars WIX_API_KEY + WIX_SITE_ID. Push target: Cabinet API /api/sync/wix-cache endpoint.
